CustomField.formula:
IF( AND( AbacusInterfaceExport__c = false, ISPICKVAL( InvoiceStatus__c ,"Ready") ), "READY",
IF( AND( AbacusInterfaceExport__c = true, NOT(ISPICKVAL( InvoiceStatus__c ,"Sent")) ), "SELECTED TO TRANSFER",
IF( AND( AbacusInterfaceExport__c = true, ISPICKVAL( InvoiceStatus__c ,"Sent") ), "TRANSFERRED", "NO STATUS")))
CustomField.label: Abacus Status
